creator: neimsaci@gmx.com
text: The issue first appeared some two months ago but with some port shuffling it went away few times. When I successfully installed a configured Xen and on first boot it appeared again but this time no port shuffling worked. Tried even flash older bios to see if it works it did not so I flashed again back latest. Enabled dtrace probe before boot, rebooted and now waiting for > file finish. Maybe will find something there.
